src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.general_idea: Removed assertions checking for specific API definition options in the HTML index page, likely because the UI structure changed or these checks were deemed brittle/unnecessary during the migration.
src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.human_impl: Removed lines checking for 'Core API', 'Workflow API', 'Authentication API', 'Search API', 'Search SQL API', and 'Discovery API' options in the index page content.

src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.general_idea: Added a new integration test to verify the presence and validity of the new 'Model API' definition, which was introduced in the newer version.
src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.human_impl: Added testModelDefinition() method that retrieves and validates the alfresco-model.yaml/json definitions.

src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.general_idea: Updated the expected count of API definitions in the index to reflect the addition of the new Model API definition.
src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.human_impl: Changed assertEquals assertion from 12 to 14 definitions.

src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.general_idea: Cleaned up trailing whitespace in the test file as part of general code hygiene during the migration.
src/test/java/org/alfresco/test/APIExplo.human_impl: Removed trailing spaces at the end of several lines.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source, target, and release properties from Java 11 to Java 17 to enforce compilation for the new JDK.
Bump the swagger-ui webjar dependency version from 3.37.0 to 3.38.0.
Update the project artifact version from 7.0.0-SNAPSHOT to 7.4.1-SNAPSHOT to reflect the new development iteration.
Change SCM connection URLs from SSH to HTTPS protocol.
Add a property to configure the Jetty HTTP port for integration tests.

README.md.general_idea: Add a GitHub Actions build status badge to the README to reflect the migration to GitHub Actions CI.
Add a pre-commit badge to indicate that the project uses pre-commit hooks.
Add a GitHub license badge to the README.
Update the copyright year range to reflect the current year and project history.
README.md.human_impl:
-Copyright (C) 2020 Alfresco Software Limited
+Copyright (C) 2016-2021 Alfresco Software Limited

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add 'storage-info' tag to the OpenAPI specification to group storage-related endpoints.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '- name: storage-info' under the 'tags' section.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add 'categories' tag to the OpenAPI specification to group category-related endpoints.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '- name: categories' under the 'tags' section.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Define 'nodeFolderIdParam' for identifying folder nodes in path parameters.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added 'nodeFolderIdParam' definition with type string and path location.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add 'isDirectLinkEnabled' as an includable field for node entries.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '* isDirectLinkEnabled' to the description lists of nodeMinimalEntryIncludeParam, nodeEntryIncludeParam, and nodeMinimalEntryIncludeParam.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Define 'categoryEntryIncludeParam' for including additional category information like count and path.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added 'categoryEntryIncludeParam' definition with array type and csv collection format.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Define 'categoryEntryIncludePathParam' for including path information in category entries.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added 'categoryEntryIncludePathParam' definition with array type and csv collection format.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Define 'categoryIdParam' for identifying categories in path parameters.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added 'categoryIdParam' definition with type string and path location.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Simplify the description of the 'download' parameter by removing redundant text about downloading.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Changed description from '...but not download the file.' to '...in a new tab or window.'

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Define 'contentPropNameParam' for specifying content property names with namespace prefixes.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added 'contentPropNameParam' definition with type string and path location.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Define 'parameterConstraintNameParam' for specifying action parameter constraint names.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added 'parameterConstraintNameParam' definition with type string and path location.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Standardize the 400 error description for tag listing to be generic.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Changed 400 description from specific invalid parameter details to 'An invalid parameter has been supplied.'

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Standardize the 400 error description for tag creation to be generic.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Changed 400 description from specific invalid body details to 'An invalid parameter has been supplied.'

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add 400 Bad Request response to the tag deletion endpoint.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '400: An invalid parameter has been supplied.' to the DELETE /tags/{tagId} responses.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add GET endpoint to list categories assigned to a specific node.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '/nodes/{nodeId}/category-links' GET operation with listCategoriesForNode operationId.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.general_idea: Add POST endpoint to assign a node to one or more categories.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-cor.human_impl: Added '/nodes/{nodeId}/category-links' POST operation with createCategoryLinkForNode operationId.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-dis.general_idea: Add isDirectAccessUrlEnabled field to the API definition to expose direct access URL capability status.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-dis.human_impl: Added 'isDirectAccessUrlEnabled' to required list and defined it as a boolean property.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-dis.general_idea: Add isCustomEmbeddedWorkflowEnabled field to the API definition to expose custom embedded workflow capability status.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-dis.human_impl: Added 'isCustomEmbeddedWorkflowEnabled' as a boolean property with default false.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.general_idea: Correct inconsistent indentation in the OpenAPI definition to ensure valid YAML parsing and Swagger UI compatibility.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.human_impl: Aligned properties under `RequestQuery`, `ResultSetPaging`, and `GenericFacetResponse` to use consistent 2-space indentation.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.general_idea: Add a concrete JSON example for the `RequestPivot` definition to improve API documentation clarity.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.human_impl: Added `example` block with `key` and `pivots` fields to `RequestPivot` definition.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.general_idea: Document a known issue with Swagger UI 3 regarding this API definition to aid developers.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.human_impl: Inserted a markdown note linking to a StackOverflow Q&A about Swagger UI 3 warnings.

src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.general_idea: Fix broken markdown line breaks and formatting in description text for better readability.
src/main/webapp/definitions/alfresco-sea.human_impl: Joined split lines in descriptions for `skipCount`, `locations`, and `highlight` parameters.

src/main/webapp/index.html.general_idea: Update the HTML title to reflect the specific product name instead of the generic framework name.
Remove unnecessary whitespace and newlines in CSS selectors for compactness.
Hide the Swagger UI error wrapper element to improve visual presentation.
Include the Model API definition in the Swagger UI dropdown list.
Enable the display of request duration in the Swagger UI interface.
Remove the automatic basic authentication pre-authorization logic from the UI initialization.
